value: Approaches tried and rejected before arriving at the ZStack pattern: (1) LinearGradient tint overlays — broke navigation rendering; (2) direct .background modifiers on NavigationStack — inconsistent during palette changes; (3) multiple gradient layers — perf and visibility issues. Don't relitigate without reading ARCHITECTURE.md's "Failed Approaches" section. Migrated from prior single-file .codexcli.json on 2026-04-29.
